raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Midnight Special,’ by Colin Asher
description: “The Midnight Special” offers an unconventional cultural history with profiles of five artists influenced by the carceral system.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Dead but Dreaming of Electric Sheep,’ by Paul Tremblay
book_title: ‘Dead but Dreaming of Electric Sheep,’ by Paul Tremblay
description: In Paul Tremblay’s new A.I. dystopia, “Dead but Dreaming of Electric Sheep,” an experimental technology gives its heroine control over somebody else’s body.
